overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a busy Night City street during golden hour. The camera follows the character past various commercial storefronts, transitioning from modern corporate buildings to grittier urban facades with heavy pedestrian and vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern commercial sidewalk with corporate storefronts

events.description: bald character in white outfit crosses the view from left to right in front of camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange tactile-paved sidewalk past modern glass storefronts

notable_agents.action: bald character in white and black outfit crossing the sidewalk from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic black cylindrical skyscraper with 06 marking and ringed platforms
elevated walkway structure spanning across the street with glass enclosure
modern commercial storefront with purple neon DATA INC signage and glass facade
storefront with illuminated red and blue TURBO lettering
distinctive bright orange textured tactile paving tiles along the pedestrian path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a modern Night City street during golden hour, with the camera walking along an orange tactile-paved sidewalk. A bald character crosses the view, and the camera passes corporate storefronts including DATA INC and TURBO, with a massive cylindrical tower visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty commercial street with vending machines and worn facades

events.description: transition from modern clean commercial area to grittier yellow building section with trash on ground
passing green and chrome retro vending machines mounted on yellow wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past yellow building facades and retro vending machines

entered.detail: weathered yellow painted building wall with peeling paint and graffiti tags
retro-style green and chrome vending machines with glass fronts
scattered newspaper sheets and litter debris on the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a grittier urban aesthetic with a worn yellow building facade and scattered trash on the ground. The camera passes retro green vending machines while maintaining a steady walking pace along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial area with outdoor food vendors and red brick buildings

events.description: entering area with red brick industrial buildings and outdoor food stalls
passing by outdoor seating area with people gathered at food vendor

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor food vendors and pedestrians on a busy sidewalk with benches

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink pants standing at green canopy food stall

entered.detail: tall red brick industrial-style building with external air conditioning units and fire escapes
green canopy food vendor stall with metal railings and people gathered
large saguaro cactus plants in rectangular concrete planters
tall building-mounted digital billboard with rotating advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier commercial area featuring a red brick building with outdoor food vendors. The camera passes cactus planters and benches while pedestrians in colorful clothing walk along the sidewalk, with large vertical billboards visible on the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with heavy vehicle traffic and commercial storefronts

events.description: approaching intersection as street widens and traffic density increases
crossing the multi-lane street among moving vehicles including a silver sedan

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street while navigating between moving cars, then continuing along opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past on the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated neon sign for Stylish Cheezis restaurant with orange lettering
line of parked vehicles including a brown van along the street curb
tall yellow traffic light pole with multiple signal arms and sensors

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy intersection with increased vehicle traffic. The camera crosses the multi-lane road, passing the Stylish Cheezis restaurant sign, and continues along the opposite sidewalk navigating between parked cars and moving traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Night City street that transforms from a polished corporate district into a gritty, crowded commercial hub during the golden hour. It begins on an orange tactile-paved sidewalk, passing modern storefronts like DATA INC and TURBO with a massive cylindrical tower looming in the distance. As the camera maintains a steady walking pace, the environment shifts toward a worn urban aesthetic characterized by yellow building facades, scattered trash, and retro green vending machines. The scene then expands into a busier commercial area featuring red brick buildings, outdoor food vendors, and large vertical billboards before turning toward a congested intersection. Finally, the camera crosses a multi-lane road past a Stylish Cheezis restaurant sign, navigating between parked cars and heavy vehicle traffic on the opposite sidewalk.
